class.name: Projector3D
class.description: Projects a [World3D] Scene into different [World3D] with custom transformation.

method.name: get_layer_mask_value
method.description: Returns whether or not the specified layer of the [member layers] is enabled, given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 20.

method.name: set_layer_mask_value
method.description: Based on [param value], enables or disables the specified layer in the [member layers], given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 20.

members.member: The render layer(s) this [Projector3D] will project.
The instance type(s) this [Projector3D] will project.
